ddls:
CREATE TABLE "campaigns" (
  "campaign_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each campaign */,
  "campaign_name" TEXT /* Name of the campaign */,
  "datasource_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the advertising datasource (e.g., Facebook Ads, Google AdWords) */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the campaign */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the campaign */,
  "budget" TEXT /* Allocated budget for the campaign */,
  "target_audience" TEXT /* Target audience for the campaign (e.g., age range, interests) */,
  "ad_format" TEXT /* Format of the ads (e.g., image, video, carousel) */,
  "ad_destination_url" TEXT /* Destination URL for the ads */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("campaign_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_campaigns_datasource_id FOREIGN KEY ("datasource_id") REFERENCES datasources ("datasource_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "datasources" (
  "datasource_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each datasource */,
  "datasource_name" TEXT /* Name of the advertising datasource (e.g., Facebook Ads, Google AdWords) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the datasource */,
  "api_version" TEXT /* Version of the API used to connect to the datasource */,
  "api_key" TEXT /* API key for authenticating with the datasource */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("datasource_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "performance_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance metric entry */,
  "campaign_id" INTEGER /* ID of the campaign associated with the metrics */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the recorded metrics */,
  "clicks" INTEGER /* Number of clicks received by the campaign */,
  "impressions" INTEGER /* Number of impressions generated by the campaign */,
  "conversions" INTEGER /* Number of conversions (e.g., sales, sign-ups) generated by the campaign */,
  "cost" TEXT /* Total cost of the campaign for the given date */,
  "ctr" TEXT /* Click-through rate (CTR) of the campaign */,
  "cpc" TEXT /* Cost per click (CPC) of the campaign */,
  "cpa" TEXT /* Cost per acquisition (CPA) of the campaign */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_metrics_campaign_id FOREIGN KEY ("campaign_id") REFERENCES campaigns ("campaign_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., analyst, admin) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions associated with the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "clients" (
  "client_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each client */,
  "client_name" TEXT /* Name of the client */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the client */,
  "contact_phone" TEXT /* Contact phone number for the client */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the client */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("client_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "client_campaigns" (
  "client_campaign_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each client-campaign relationship */,
  "client_id" INTEGER /* ID of the related client */,
  "campaign_id" INTEGER /* ID of the related campaign */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the client-campaign relationship */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the client-campaign relationship */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("client_campaign_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_client_campaigns_campaign_id FOREIGN KEY ("campaign_id") REFERENCES campaigns ("campaign_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_client_campaigns_client_id FOREIGN KEY ("client_id") REFERENCES clients ("client_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "campaign_id" INTEGER /* ID of the associated campaign */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date the report was generated */,
  "report_data" TEXT /* Data included in the report (e.g., clicks, impressions) */,
  "report_format" TEXT /* Format of the report (e.g., PDF, CSV) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_campaign_id FOREIGN KEY ("campaign_id") REFERENCES campaigns ("campaign_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "analytics_dashboards" (
  "dashboard_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dashboard */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user owning the dashboard */,
  "dashboard_name" TEXT /* Name of the dashboard */,
  "widget_config" TEXT /* Configuration details for widgets on the dashboard */,
  "layout" TEXT /* Layout of the dashboard (e.g., 2x2, 3x3) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dashboard_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analytics_dashboards_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "alerts" (
  "alert_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each alert */,
  "campaign_id" INTEGER /* ID of the related campaign */,
  "threshold" INTEGER /* Threshold value for triggering the alert */,
  "alert_message" TEXT /* Message to be sent when the alert is triggered */,
  "alert_type" TEXT /* Type of alert (e.g., email, SMS) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("alert_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_campaign_id FOREIGN KEY ("campaign_id") REFERENCES campaigns ("campaign_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "audit_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who performed the action */,
  "action" TEXT /* Action performed (e.g., login, update campaign) */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the action */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "integrations" (
  "integration_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each integration */,
  "integration_name" TEXT /* Name of the integration */,
  "api_key" TEXT /* API key for authenticating with the integration */,
  "api_secret" TEXT /* API secret for authenticating with the integration */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("integration_id")
)
